ActionRunList.ascending: Whether to sort in ascending order, default false
ActionRunList.action.id: Command ID, only available for saved commands
ActionRunList.action.name: Command name, only available for saved commands
ActionRunList.state: Filter by execution status. Enum values: FAILED (execution failed), RUNNING (executing), SUCCESS (execution succeeded)
ActionRunList.startTime: Time filter, Unix timestamp (ms). Execution start time >= startTime, Unix timestamp (ms)
ActionRunList.endTime: Time filter, Unix timestamp (ms). Execution start time <= endTime, Unix timestamp (ms)
